title: Tryna chime
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Tryna chime''' was one of three instruments used to form a [[Drumheller harp/Legends|drumheller harp]], and was essentially a sheet of metal shaped like an arrowhead.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1998-10-05 -->''[[Star Wars: The Visual Dictionary]]''
